title: Planet Labs (PL) Stock Forecast: Analyst Ratings, Predictions & Price Target 2026
text:
Analyst consensus for Planet Labs (PL) maintains a Buy rating with a consensus price prediction of $30.22 as of May 13, 2026, representing stable valuation expectations from investment research firms. Nine analysts have given Planet Labs a consensus rating of Buy, reflecting confidence in the company's growth prospects.

Planet Labs PBC is forecast to grow earnings and revenue by 33.1% and 23.9% per annum respectively, with EPS expected to grow by 31.7% per annum. These growth forecasts significantly exceed broader market averages, positioning the company as a high-growth technology stock. The combination of top-line growth and improving unit economics supports analyst expectations for continued outperformance.

The company's fiscal 2026 achievement of profitability with $15.5 million adjusted EBITDA marks a critical inflection point. Analysts expect this profitability to expand as the company scales operations and pulls forward backlog. Free cash flow of $52.9 million demonstrates the company's ability to fund growth internally while maintaining positive capital allocation.

Defense & Intelligence segment growth exceeding 50% year-over-year validates analyst expectations that government spending on satellite intelligence will accelerate. The $900 million backlog, predominantly from defense and government customers, provides visibility for achieving fiscal 2027 guidance of $415-440 million revenue. Analyst price targets range from $20 to $40, with the median at $33, suggesting potential for additional appreciation from current levels.

The consensus view reflects confidence in Planet Labs' ability to execute on its satellite deployment roadmap, capitalize on growing defense demand, and expand margins as the company matures. Key catalysts include quarterly earnings beats, major contract announcements, and successful satellite launches demonstrating constellation build-out progress.
